## Checklist

- [ ] The change keeps all user text processing in the browser (no new outbound fetches of user content)
- [ ] If i18n strings were added or changed, all four locales (en/ja/zh-CN/zh-TW) are kept in sync
- [ ] Documentation / README updated if user-facing behavior changed
